test_cases.name: Verify Homepage Loads and Cookie Acceptance
test_cases.description: Tests if the homepage loads successfully and the cookie acceptance banner can be dismissed by clicking 'Accept All'.
steps: Navigate to the homepage.
Click 'Accept All' on the cookie banner.
Verify a main navigation element is visible, implying the cookie banner is no longer obscuring content.
expected_results: Main page content is fully accessible.
test_cases.author: AI

test_cases.name: Verify Navigation to About Us Page
test_cases.description: Tests navigation from the homepage to the 'เกี่ยวกับเรา' (About Us) page via the header link.
preconditions: Homepage is loaded and cookie banner handled.
steps: Navigate to the homepage.
Click the 'เกี่ยวกับเรา' link in the header.
Verify the URL changes to the About Us page.
Verify specific text from the About Us page is visible.
expected_results: User is successfully navigated to the About Us page.
About Us page content is displayed correctly.

actions.value: วิสัยทัศน์และพันธกิจ

test_cases.author: AI

test_cases.name: Verify Facebook Social Media Link Functionality
test_cases.description: Tests if clicking the Facebook social media icon navigates to the correct external Facebook page.
preconditions: Homepage is loaded and cookie banner handled.
steps: Navigate to the homepage.
Click the Facebook icon.
Verify the browser navigates to the Terabyte Plus Facebook page URL.
expected_results: The Facebook page for Terabyte Plus is opened successfully.
test_cases.author: AI

test_cases.name: Verify Navigation to Cloud & Recurring Services Detail Page
test_cases.description: Tests navigation from the homepage to the 'ผลิตภัณฑ์และบริการ' (Products & Services) page, then to the 'CLOUD & RECURRING SERVICES' detail page.
preconditions: Homepage is loaded and cookie banner handled.
steps: Navigate to the homepage.
Click the 'ผลิตภัณฑ์และบริการ' link in the header.
Click the 'ดูรายละเอียด' (View Details) button for 'CLOUD & RECURRING SERVICES'.
Verify the URL changes to the Cloud & Recurring Services page.
expected_results: User is successfully navigated to the Cloud & Recurring Services detail page.
The detail page's URL is correct.
test_cases.author: AI

test_cases.name: Verify Search Toggle Functionality
test_cases.description: Tests if clicking the search toggle button reveals a search input field.
preconditions: Homepage is loaded and cookie banner handled.
steps: Navigate to the homepage.
Click the 'Search' toggle button.
Verify that a search input field or search container becomes visible.
expected_results: Search input field/container is displayed after clicking the toggle.
test_cases.author: AI

test_cases.name: Verify Footer Home Link on Products & Services Page
test_cases.description: Tests navigation from the Products & Services page back to the homepage using the footer 'หน้าหลัก' (Home) link.
steps: Navigate to the Products & Services page.
Click the 'หน้าหลัก' (Home) link in the footer.
Verify the URL changes back to the homepage.
expected_results: User is successfully navigated back to the homepage from the footer link.

actions.selector: footer a:has-text('หน้าหลัก')

test_cases.author: AI

test_cases.name: Verify Skip to Content Link Functionality
test_cases.description: Tests if the 'Skip to content' link correctly changes the URL hash to '#main', indicating a jump to the main content area.
preconditions: Homepage is loaded and cookie banner handled.
steps: Navigate to the homepage.
Click the 'Skip to content' link.
Verify the URL hash contains '#main'.
expected_results: The page's URL reflects the jump to the main content section.
test_cases.author: AI

test_cases.name: Verify Mailto Link Presence
test_cases.description: Tests if the 'marketing@terabyteplus.com' mailto link is present and visible on the homepage, without triggering an external application.
preconditions: Homepage is loaded and cookie banner handled.
steps: Navigate to the homepage.
Verify the 'marketing@terabyteplus.com' link is visible.
Verify the page URL remains unchanged, indicating no browser navigation occurred.
expected_results: The mailto link is visible on the page.
Clicking or interacting with the mailto link does not cause browser navigation.
test_cases.author: AI

test_cases.name: Verify Homepage Carousel Navigation
test_cases.description: Tests if the homepage carousel's 'Next slide' and 'Previous slide' buttons are clickable and trigger a slide change.
preconditions: Homepage is loaded and cookie banner handled.
steps: Navigate to the homepage.
Click the 'Next slide' button.
Click the 'Previous slide' button.
Verify a carousel pagination bullet is visible, indicating the carousel is present and interactive.
expected_results: Carousel slides forward and backward successfully.
Carousel elements remain visible and interactive.
test_cases.author: AI

test_cases.name: Verify Investor Relations External Link
test_cases.description: Tests if clicking the 'นักลงทุนสัมพันธ์' (Investor Relations) link navigates to the external investor relations website.
preconditions: Homepage is loaded and cookie banner handled.
steps: Navigate to the homepage.
Click the 'นักลงทุนสัมพันธ์' link in the header.
Verify the URL changes to the external investor.terabyteplus.com website.
expected_results: User is successfully navigated to the investor.terabyteplus.com website.
test_cases.author: AI
